title: Elch's PvP Pack
description: Perfect for PvP and cPvP. And with boat cars.
body:
## What is Elch's PvP Pack?
A texture pack that is perfect for PvP. Small details like boats that look like cars make the pack special.

### Features:
- Boat Cars
- Custom Swords
- Greenier Grass
- Custom Totem
- and more

![Boat & Sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae9d3b7e23fefc33040eee7d0a94345b8ce96e3d.png)![Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2391e287af35bd33d12e9f73e78de433b5310336.png)![Crystal + Obsidian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e85cb70e19c789a824c06666e4c7c3e422ac7d0.png)![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d229b15fb73b8812967a77cae5d9a11b6bce811.png)
